metadata.title:
PRATT'S EFFORT TO GET


ON BAND WAGON

pages.raw_text:
One Of the amusing things in the
struggle over the adoption of the
new city charter is the effort of
Mayor Pratt and his adherents to
get on the bandwagon, with a view
of perpetuating themselves in Of
flee.


A commission form of govern.
ment with a lot of commissioners
of the Pratt saliber would be the
direst calamity that ever happened
to Spokane. The power for evil Of
a set of men Of this makeup is in
finitely increased under the COM
mission plan, but it is not contem-
plated that the people will be SO
blind to their own interests as to
permit this to occur.


The committee having the adop-
ton of the new charter in hand
should sidetrack the Pratt support.
1t is positive detriment in the
movement, as if there is one thing
above another that will defeat the
new charter it is the too active
interest of Mayor Pratt. This is
said with a knowledge of the situa-
ton, derived from interviews with
scores Of citizens who take little
or no active part in politics, but
